[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000111 3
1 10000100 2
2 00110000 2
3 00001011 3
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 00000000 a
7 00000000 a

01 10 00001001 2
12 21 00100001 2
23 32 00110000 2 match 2
34 43 00010100 2
45 54 00000111 3 match 0

67 76 00110000 2 match 2
70 07 00001011 3 match 3
